short_text: Trumpelmann to Livingstone, Livingstone Run Out!! 1 run completed. 126.9kph, very full, drilled to the right of the bowl
full_text: Trumpelmann to Livingstone, Livingstone Run Out!! 1 run completed. 126.9kph, very full, drilled to the right of the bowler who half-stops. The batters try to steal the second but the bowler gets to the ball quickly and throws it to the keeper who completes the formalities. Livingstone is walking off holding his side, he probably swung his bat too hard.

short_text: Trumpelmann to Livingstone, byes, 2 runs, short outside off, Livingstone swings and misses. Zane Green misses the target
full_text: Trumpelmann to Livingstone, byes, 2 runs, short outside off, Livingstone swings and misses. Zane Green misses the target, Trumpelmann collects and turns around, misses the direct-hit and it results in an additional run

short_text: Trumpelmann to Livingstone, , Trumpelmann misses his yorker, bowls it in the slot and gets punished. Livingstone shuffle
full_text: Trumpelmann to Livingstone, , Trumpelmann misses his yorker, bowls it in the slot and gets punished. Livingstone shuffles a bit, gets under it and tonks it over long-on

short_text: Trumpelmann to Livingstone, , one-handed six! The bottom hand comes off the bat handle as Livingstone shuffles to hoick
full_text: Trumpelmann to Livingstone, , one-handed six! The bottom hand comes off the bat handle as Livingstone shuffles to hoick across the line. Dispatches his length ball over deep backward square leg for a 69m six

short_text: Trumpelmann to Moeen Ali, Caught by Davin!! Holes out! Dug in short by Trumpelmann at 124.3ph, Moeen Ali makes decent co
full_text: Trumpelmann to Moeen Ali, Caught by Davin!! Holes out! Dug in short by Trumpelmann at 124.3ph, Moeen Ali makes decent contact with his pull shot but it's the longer side and he picks out the man at deep midwicket. Davin comes forward and gets low to snaffle it with both hands.

short_text: Trumpelmann to Moeen Ali, , slower ball on a length, Moeen Ali moves leg-side and swings hard to hit it high and over lo
full_text: Trumpelmann to Moeen Ali, , slower ball on a length, Moeen Ali moves leg-side and swings hard to hit it high and over long-on. Off the bottom part of the bat but the ball has the wings to go all the way

short_text: Jack Brassell to Harry Brook, , 127.5kph, full now and Harry Brook - for the second time in this over - gets inside the
full_text: Jack Brassell to Harry Brook, , 127.5kph, full now and Harry Brook - for the second time in this over - gets inside the line to scoop it fine of short fine leg.

short_text: Jack Brassell to Harry Brook, , slow and short, a backing away Brook waits and belts it over deep extra cover. Stood tal
full_text: Jack Brassell to Harry Brook, , slow and short, a backing away Brook waits and belts it over deep extra cover. Stood tall and generated the power

short_text: Jack Brassell to Harry Brook, , 128.4kph, Harry Brook shuffles across, gets low and scoops this full delivery over short
full_text: Jack Brassell to Harry Brook, , 128.4kph, Harry Brook shuffles across, gets low and scoops this full delivery over short fine leg

short_text: Jack Brassell to Harry Brook, 2 runs, 127.8kph, Harry Brook looks to whip, no timing as it hits the top part of the bat.
full_text: Jack Brassell to Harry Brook, 2 runs, 127.8kph, Harry Brook looks to whip, no timing as it hits the top part of the bat. Lobs up and falls in the vacant midwicket region

short_text: Jack Brassell to Harry Brook, 2 runs, 127.8kph, Brassell follows a backing away Harry Brook who chips it through midwick
full_text: Jack Brassell to Harry Brook, 2 runs, 127.8kph, Brassell follows a backing away Harry Brook who chips it through midwicket off the inner edge

short_text: Jack Brassell to Moeen Ali, 1 run, round the wicket, length ball, Moeen Ali shuffles and swings it away to deep backward
full_text: Jack Brassell to Moeen Ali, 1 run, round the wicket, length ball, Moeen Ali shuffles and swings it away to deep backward square leg

short_text: Scholtz to Harry Brook, 2 runs, 84.1kph, flighted outside off, driven with the spin to deep extra cover
full_text: Scholtz to Harry Brook, 2 runs, 84.1kph, flighted outside off, driven with the spin to deep extra cover

short_text: Scholtz to Harry Brook, 2 runs, driven to the left of long-off
full_text: Scholtz to Harry Brook, 2 runs, driven to the left of long-off

short_text: Scholtz to Moeen Ali, 1 run, shorter and wider, slapped to deep extra cover
full_text: Scholtz to Moeen Ali, 1 run, shorter and wider, slapped to deep extra cover

short_text: Scholtz to Moeen Ali, , 97.9kph, full and in the slot, Moeen Ali gets under it and brings his bottom hand into play to l
full_text: Scholtz to Moeen Ali, , 97.9kph, full and in the slot, Moeen Ali gets under it and brings his bottom hand into play to loft it over wide long-on. The man in the deep moves to his left and leaps but to no avail

short_text: Scholtz to Moeen Ali, 2 runs, spins in with good bounce, heaved towards deep square leg. The ball hit him high on the ba
full_text: Scholtz to Moeen Ali, 2 runs, spins in with good bounce, heaved towards deep square leg. The ball hit him high on the bat

short_text: Scholtz to Bairstow, Caught by Zane Green!! Scholtz bravely tosses it up outside off, Bairstow throws his arms hard at i
full_text: Scholtz to Bairstow, Caught by Zane Green!! Scholtz bravely tosses it up outside off, Bairstow throws his arms hard at it to slash it away over the infield on the off-side. Only manages to get a top-edge and the keeper calls for it. Runs towards the point region and takes a safe catch.

short_text: Erasmus to Harry Brook, 2 runs, 103.7kph, fullish delivery, whipped to the right of long-on for another brace.
full_text: Erasmus to Harry Brook, 2 runs, 103.7kph, fullish delivery, whipped to the right of long-on for another brace.

short_text: Erasmus to Harry Brook, , 108kph, quick on the stumps, Harry Brook makes room by backing way and cuts. Slightly uppish b
full_text: Erasmus to Harry Brook, , 108kph, quick on the stumps, Harry Brook makes room by backing way and cuts. Slightly uppish but Brook manages to hit it into the gap behind square on the off-side

short_text: Erasmus to Harry Brook, 2 runs, Brook backs away and Erasmus follows him, tickled to fine leg for a brace.
full_text: Erasmus to Harry Brook, 2 runs, Brook backs away and Erasmus follows him, tickled to fine leg for a brace.

short_text: Erasmus to Harry Brook, 2 runs, 106.7kph, leg-lined, flicked to deep midwicket and the batters decide to the come back f
full_text: Erasmus to Harry Brook, 2 runs, 106.7kph, leg-lined, flicked to deep midwicket and the batters decide to the come back for the second. Decent throw to the bowler's end but Erasmus fails to collect the ball cleanly and breaks the sticks without the ball in his hands. Bairstow survives

short_text: Erasmus to Bairstow, leg byes, 1 run, 105.7kph, fuller and quicker on the pads, Bairstow gets down to slog it over deep
full_text: Erasmus to Bairstow, leg byes, 1 run, 105.7kph, fuller and quicker on the pads, Bairstow gets down to slog it over deep backward square leg. Misses and the ball thuds into his pad before dribbling it towards backward point

short_text: Erasmus to Bairstow, , 91.1kph, shortish ball, Bairstow pounces. Quickly rocks back to hammer it over deep square leg wi
full_text: Erasmus to Bairstow, , 91.1kph, shortish ball, Bairstow pounces. Quickly rocks back to hammer it over deep square leg with a pull shot for an 81m six

short_text: Jack Brassell to Harry Brook, no run, 131.3kph, extra bounce from a length, bounces over Harry Brook's blade who tries t
full_text: Jack Brassell to Harry Brook, no run, 131.3kph, extra bounce from a length, bounces over Harry Brook's blade who tries to cut

short_text: Jack Brassell to Harry Brook, no run, takes off sharply from a full length outside off, Brook wants to drive/loft downto
full_text: Jack Brassell to Harry Brook, no run, takes off sharply from a full length outside off, Brook wants to drive/loft downtown and is beaten on the outside edge

short_text: Jack Brassell to Harry Brook, , 128.2kph, Brassell pulls his length back and serves width. Quick hands from Brook to cut
full_text: Jack Brassell to Harry Brook, , 128.2kph, Brassell pulls his length back and serves width. Quick hands from Brook to cut it to the left of the diving backward point fielder

short_text: Jack Brassell to Harry Brook, , 131.6kph, fuller ball on off, Brook wallops it over deep midwicket
full_text: Jack Brassell to Harry Brook, , 131.6kph, fuller ball on off, Brook wallops it over deep midwicket

short_text: Jack Brassell to Harry Brook, 2 runs, 130.4kph, fuller than a length outside off, slashed away to deep backward point. D
full_text: Jack Brassell to Harry Brook, 2 runs, 130.4kph, fuller than a length outside off, slashed away to deep backward point. Davin covers a lot of distance to his left and does well to stop it

short_text: Jack Brassell to Bairstow, 1 run, length ball that sticks a bit, uppishly pushed to the right of extra cover
full_text: Jack Brassell to Bairstow, 1 run, length ball that sticks a bit, uppishly pushed to the right of extra cover

short_text: Erasmus to Bairstow, 1 run, 89.1kph, much slower, Bairstow moves leg-side to mow it through midwicket and inside-edges t
full_text: Erasmus to Bairstow, 1 run, 89.1kph, much slower, Bairstow moves leg-side to mow it through midwicket and inside-edges through square leg for a single

short_text: Erasmus to Bairstow, no run, 105.8kph, Bairstow gets down on one leg to heave and is struck on the thigh outside the lin
full_text: Erasmus to Bairstow, no run, 105.8kph, Bairstow gets down on one leg to heave and is struck on the thigh outside the line of leg-stump

short_text: Erasmus to Bairstow, , short of length, Bairstow rocks back to pummel it with a pull shot through midwicket. Struck hard
full_text: Erasmus to Bairstow, , short of length, Bairstow rocks back to pummel it with a pull shot through midwicket. Struck hard and flat, hits the rope on the half-volley

short_text: Erasmus to Bairstow, 2 runs, in the air and safe! 105.2kph, fuller and quicker, Bairstow clears his front leg to slog an
full_text: Erasmus to Bairstow, 2 runs, in the air and safe! 105.2kph, fuller and quicker, Bairstow clears his front leg to slog and gets a fat top-edge. Lobs up in the air and falls between three converging Namibia fielders (bowler, long-on and long-off)

short_text: Erasmus to Bairstow, 2 runs, 102.9kph, Bairstow cuts uppishly, not fully in control but well wide of backward point
full_text: Erasmus to Bairstow, 2 runs, 102.9kph, Bairstow cuts uppishly, not fully in control but well wide of backward point

short_text: Erasmus to Harry Brook, 1 run, round the wicket, shortish outside off, slapped to deep extra cover
full_text: Erasmus to Harry Brook, 1 run, round the wicket, shortish outside off, slapped to deep extra cover

short_text: Scholtz to Bairstow, no run, was that a chance? Scholtz has his hands on head. 90.5kph, shortened length and Bairstow ro
full_text: Scholtz to Bairstow, no run, was that a chance? Scholtz has his hands on head. 90.5kph, shortened length and Bairstow rocks back to heave it across the line. There was a noise when the ball went close to the bat and the keeper failed to grab it. Bairstow might have got a top-edge there.

short_text: Scholtz to Bairstow, , muscled! 91.9kph, Scholtz goes full, almost in the blockhole. Bairstow goes back, clears is front
full_text: Scholtz to Bairstow, , muscled! 91.9kph, Scholtz goes full, almost in the blockhole. Bairstow goes back, clears is front leg and bludgeons it over long-on

short_text: Scholtz to Bairstow, , 95.7kph, angled in on off and Bairstow brings out the reverse-sweep to hit it over backward point
full_text: Scholtz to Bairstow, , 95.7kph, angled in on off and Bairstow brings out the reverse-sweep to hit it over backward point. Very good contact on this occasion from Bairstow

short_text: Scholtz to Bairstow, no run, turn and bounce on this occasion, Bairstow rocks back to pull and fails to connect
full_text: Scholtz to Bairstow, no run, turn and bounce on this occasion, Bairstow rocks back to pull and fails to connect

short_text: Scholtz to Bairstow, no run, spin! 88.1kph, not much bounce but the ball turns away outside off, Bairstow gets down on o
full_text: Scholtz to Bairstow, no run, spin! 88.1kph, not much bounce but the ball turns away outside off, Bairstow gets down on one leg to slogsweep and is beaten comprehensively on the outside edge

short_text: Scholtz to Harry Brook, 1 run, 93.6kph, in-dart from round the wicket, worked through midwicket for a single
full_text: Scholtz to Harry Brook, 1 run, 93.6kph, in-dart from round the wicket, worked through midwicket for a single

short_text: Wiese to Bairstow, no run, 124kph, beauty from Wiese! In-angler from wide of the crease that curls away late to beat the
full_text: Wiese to Bairstow, no run, 124kph, beauty from Wiese! In-angler from wide of the crease that curls away late to beat the outside edge of Bairstow who shapes to drive

short_text: Wiese to Bairstow, , 107.7kph, pace off, full in length and Bairstow gets half-forward to chip it over the bowler's head
full_text: Wiese to Bairstow, , 107.7kph, pace off, full in length and Bairstow gets half-forward to chip it over the bowler's head. Good timing and the ball runs away to the fence

short_text: Wiese to Bairstow, no run, 124.5kph, not much room and Bairstow chops it to cover point off the under-edge
full_text: Wiese to Bairstow, no run, 124.5kph, not much room and Bairstow chops it to cover point off the under-edge

short_text: Wiese to Harry Brook, 1 run, back of a length, tapped in front of backward point for a quick single
full_text: Wiese to Harry Brook, 1 run, back of a length, tapped in front of backward point for a quick single

short_text: Wiese to Harry Brook, no run, 125.5kph, pitched up, swings away and Harry Brook is compact in his defence
full_text: Wiese to Harry Brook, no run, 125.5kph, pitched up, swings away and Harry Brook is compact in his defence

short_text: Wiese to Philip Salt, Caught by Zane Green!! 106.9kph, pace off and not picked by the batter. It's the knuckle ball that
full_text: Wiese to Philip Salt, Caught by Zane Green!! 106.9kph, pace off and not picked by the batter. It's the knuckle ball that moves away a touch from a length, Salt is early to punch and gets an outside edge that's been pouched by the keeper.

short_text: Trumpelmann to Philip Salt, 1 run, 121.7kph, short of length ball on middle and leg, a hopping Salt nudges it into the l
full_text: Trumpelmann to Philip Salt, 1 run, 121.7kph, short of length ball on middle and leg, a hopping Salt nudges it into the leg-side for a quick single. Trumpelmann gets to the ball quickly, turns around and misses the target at the non-striker's end. Salt would have made his ground even if there had been a direct-hit

short_text: Trumpelmann to Philip Salt, , 121kph, sprays this back of a length ball miles outside off
full_text: Trumpelmann to Philip Salt, , 121kph, sprays this back of a length ball miles outside off

short_text: Trumpelmann to Philip Salt, , 124.4kph, shorter and wider, Philip Salt throws his arms at it to slash it over short thir
full_text: Trumpelmann to Philip Salt, , 124.4kph, shorter and wider, Philip Salt throws his arms at it to slash it over short third man off the top-edge. Back-to-back fours for Salt

short_text: Trumpelmann to Philip Salt, , 126kph, short of length, too predictable. Philip Salt stands tall, waits for it and slaps
full_text: Trumpelmann to Philip Salt, , 126kph, short of length, too predictable. Philip Salt stands tall, waits for it and slaps it over the non-striker's head. No chance for mid-off to even get close to it

short_text: Trumpelmann to Bairstow, 1 run, 124.3kph, another inswinger, Bairstow closes his bat-face early and gets a leading edge
full_text: Trumpelmann to Bairstow, 1 run, 124.3kph, another inswinger, Bairstow closes his bat-face early and gets a leading edge towards mid-off

short_text: Trumpelmann to Buttler, Bowled!! 121.6kph, full and swinging in, Buttler stays in his crease to hoick it across the line
full_text: Trumpelmann to Buttler, Bowled!! 121.6kph, full and swinging in, Buttler stays in his crease to hoick it across the line sans any feet movement. The ball swings past the inside edge, hits the back leg and deflects onto the off-stump. Superb start for Namibia.

short_text: Trumpelmann to Philip Salt, 1 run, 123.1kph, short of length ball around off, punched towards the extra cover region for
full_text: Trumpelmann to Philip Salt, 1 run, 123.1kph, short of length ball around off, punched towards the extra cover region for a quick single

short_text: Wiese to Buttler, no run, swings and misses! 125.3kph, shortish outside off, Buttler fails to make contact with his pull
full_text: Wiese to Buttler, no run, swings and misses! 125.3kph, shortish outside off, Buttler fails to make contact with his pull shot. Just 1 run off the opening over and Wiese managed to beat the edge on four occasions

short_text: Wiese to Buttler, no run, 128.8kph, Wiese gets this one to shape away from the right-hander, Buttler stays leg-side and
full_text: Wiese to Buttler, no run, 128.8kph, Wiese gets this one to shape away from the right-hander, Buttler stays leg-side and chases it with an opened bat-face sans any feet movement. Beaten on the outside edge!

short_text: Wiese to Buttler, no run, 126.7kph, good length delivery that holds onto the pitch, Buttler is early into his push and a
full_text: Wiese to Buttler, no run, 126.7kph, good length delivery that holds onto the pitch, Buttler is early into his push and almost chips it back to the bowler

short_text: Wiese to Philip Salt, 1 run, 129.7kph, back of a length, Philip Salt stays back to tap it towards cover and gets off the
full_text: Wiese to Philip Salt, 1 run, 129.7kph, back of a length, Philip Salt stays back to tap it towards cover and gets off the mark with a quick single

short_text: Wiese to Philip Salt, no run, 125.4kph, shorter in length, Salt swings across the line and is beaten by the extra bounce
full_text: Wiese to Philip Salt, no run, 125.4kph, shorter in length, Salt swings across the line and is beaten by the extra bounce

short_text: Wiese to Philip Salt, no run, seams away from a short of length, comes slower than the batter expects. Philip Salt is ea
full_text: Wiese to Philip Salt, no run, seams away from a short of length, comes slower than the batter expects. Philip Salt is early to heave/pull and misses

short_text: Jofra Archer to Erasmus, no run, another back of the hand slower ball dug in, Erasmus looks to reverse-scoop and misses,
full_text: Jofra Archer to Erasmus, no run, another back of the hand slower ball dug in, Erasmus looks to reverse-scoop and misses, England win handsomely

short_text: Jofra Archer to Smit, leg byes, 1 run, full and angling down the leg-side, past leg-stump, Smit drives and misses, rappe
full_text: Jofra Archer to Smit, leg byes, 1 run, full and angling down the leg-side, past leg-stump, Smit drives and misses, rapped on the pads and they take a legbye

short_text: Jofra Archer to Smit, , dug in short, Smit pulls and misses, too high and a wide called
full_text: Jofra Archer to Smit, , dug in short, Smit pulls and misses, too high and a wide called

short_text: Jofra Archer to Wiese, Caught by Harry Brook!! Again Brook takes the catch at long-on. Simpler one this time. A back of
full_text: Jofra Archer to Wiese, Caught by Harry Brook!! Again Brook takes the catch at long-on. Simpler one this time. A back of the hand slower ball dug in, Wiese miscues the pull and holes out. An ovation for Wiese who walks off with both arms raised and his team-mates too clap him in.. A couple of England players walk to Wiese and hug him.

short_text: Jofra Archer to Erasmus, 1 run, slower ball and into the pitch, Erasmus pulls to deep mid-wicket
full_text: Jofra Archer to Erasmus, 1 run, slower ball and into the pitch, Erasmus pulls to deep mid-wicket

short_text: Jofra Archer to Erasmus, no run, slower ball leg-cutter full just outside off, Erasmus swings and misses
full_text: Jofra Archer to Erasmus, no run, slower ball leg-cutter full just outside off, Erasmus swings and misses

short_text: Jofra Archer to Wiese, 1 run, a low full-toss on the stumps, flicked to deep mid-wicket for one
full_text: Jofra Archer to Wiese, 1 run, a low full-toss on the stumps, flicked to deep mid-wicket for one

short_text: Jordan to Michael van Lingen, Caught by Harry Brook!! Good catch at long-on. Full and in the slot, lofted and Brook move
full_text: Jordan to Michael van Lingen, Caught by Harry Brook!! Good catch at long-on. Full and in the slot, lofted and Brook moves to his right and leaps at the right time to take it with both hands.

short_text: Jordan to Michael van Lingen, , slower ball off-cutter across Michael van Lingen and he picks it, pulls it hard and flat
full_text: Jordan to Michael van Lingen, , slower ball off-cutter across Michael van Lingen and he picks it, pulls it hard and flat over deep mid-wicket

short_text: Jordan to Michael van Lingen, no run, slower ball off-cutter full outside off, driven back and this game's as good as do
full_text: Jordan to Michael van Lingen, no run, slower ball off-cutter full outside off, driven back and this game's as good as done now

short_text: Jordan to Wiese, 1 run, very full on the stumps, seam-up, Wiese can only toe-end the drive to the left of Jordan
full_text: Jordan to Wiese, 1 run, very full on the stumps, seam-up, Wiese can only toe-end the drive to the left of Jordan

short_text: Jordan to Michael van Lingen, 1 run, slower ball off-cutter full outside off, Michael van Lingen shuffles across and lof
full_text: Jordan to Michael van Lingen, 1 run, slower ball off-cutter full outside off, Michael van Lingen shuffles across and lofts on the bounce to long-on

short_text: Jordan to Wiese, 1 run, slower short of length delivery into the pitch, Wiese miscues the pull to deep mid-wicket and it
full_text: Jordan to Wiese, 1 run, slower short of length delivery into the pitch, Wiese miscues the pull to deep mid-wicket and it's just one

short_text: Adil Rashid to Wiese, 1 run, slower and turns across Wiese who helps the pull to deep mid-wicket and retains the strike
full_text: Adil Rashid to Wiese, 1 run, slower and turns across Wiese who helps the pull to deep mid-wicket and retains the strike with that run

short_text: Adil Rashid to Wiese, , shorter and wider outside off, Wiese moves across and punches it superbly, over extra-cover and
full_text: Adil Rashid to Wiese, , shorter and wider outside off, Wiese moves across and punches it superbly, over extra-cover and beats both deep extra-cover and long-off, one bounce over the ropes

short_text: Adil Rashid to Wiese, , now the slogsweep, too full on the stumps, Wiese nails this and this has gone a long way back ov
full_text: Adil Rashid to Wiese, , now the slogsweep, too full on the stumps, Wiese nails this and this has gone a long way back over deep mid-wicket. 87m hit

short_text: Adil Rashid to Wiese, , that's a tremendous blow. Slower but shorter outside off, Wiese goes on the back foot and pummel
full_text: Adil Rashid to Wiese, , that's a tremendous blow. Slower but shorter outside off, Wiese goes on the back foot and pummels it high and long over long-off. Terrific blow

short_text: Adil Rashid to Wiese, 2 runs, fraction short outside off, cut to Salt at sweeper cover and his throw slips out and goes
full_text: Adil Rashid to Wiese, 2 runs, fraction short outside off, cut to Salt at sweeper cover and his throw slips out and goes to his left, they take one and Salt has a wry smile on his face. Adil Rashid though is not too pleased

short_text: Adil Rashid to Michael van Lingen, 1 run, tossed up googly on the stumps, Michael van Lingen comes down the track and lo
full_text: Adil Rashid to Michael van Lingen, 1 run, tossed up googly on the stumps, Michael van Lingen comes down the track and lofts to long-on for one

short_text: Sam Curran to Wiese, no run, short of length and angling into Wiese who goes on the back foot to tuck, misses, rapped on
full_text: Sam Curran to Wiese, no run, short of length and angling into Wiese who goes on the back foot to tuck, misses, rapped on the pads but too high and not even an appeal from England

short_text: Sam Curran to Michael van Lingen, 1 run, back of the hand slower ball wide outside off, slashed to sweeper cover
full_text: Sam Curran to Michael van Lingen, 1 run, back of the hand slower ball wide outside off, slashed to sweeper cover

short_text: Sam Curran to Wiese, 1 run, good length on the stumps, turned to the vacant square leg area
full_text: Sam Curran to Wiese, 1 run, good length on the stumps, turned to the vacant square leg area

short_text: Sam Curran to Wiese, , back of a length outside off, hint of width and Wiese back-cuts between backward point and short
full_text: Sam Curran to Wiese, , back of a length outside off, hint of width and Wiese back-cuts between backward point and short third man, well played

short_text: Sam Curran to Michael van Lingen, 1 run, short of length outside off, pulled hard and straight to deep mid-wicket, on th
full_text: Sam Curran to Michael van Lingen, 1 run, short of length outside off, pulled hard and straight to deep mid-wicket, on the bounce

short_text: Sam Curran to Michael van Lingen, no run, slower ball wide outside off, length, Michael van Lingen drives hard and strai
full_text: Sam Curran to Michael van Lingen, no run, slower ball wide outside off, length, Michael van Lingen drives hard and straight to extra-cover

short_text: Adil Rashid to Michael van Lingen, leg byes, 1 run, the googly and Michael van Lingen shuffles across to sweep, misses,
full_text: Adil Rashid to Michael van Lingen, leg byes, 1 run, the googly and Michael van Lingen shuffles across to sweep, misses, rapped on the pads but impact may well have been just outside off. They try to run a legbye and

short_text: Adil Rashid to Davin, 1 run, again slower and this time Davin waits and punches off the back foot to long-off
full_text: Adil Rashid to Davin, 1 run, again slower and this time Davin waits and punches off the back foot to long-off

short_text: Adil Rashid to Davin, no run, lovely legbreak outside off, slower and turns to beat the slogsweep of Davin
full_text: Adil Rashid to Davin, no run, lovely legbreak outside off, slower and turns to beat the slogsweep of Davin

short_text: Adil Rashid to Davin, , shorter, wider outside off, turns but too much turn and it's left alone to take the wide
full_text: Adil Rashid to Davin, , shorter, wider outside off, turns but too much turn and it's left alone to take the wide

short_text: Adil Rashid to Davin, no run, slower legbreak outside off, wider and it turns to beat Davin's sweep
full_text: Adil Rashid to Davin, no run, slower legbreak outside off, wider and it turns to beat Davin's sweep

short_text: Adil Rashid to Michael van Lingen, 1 run, again tossed up outside the leg-stump, Michael van Lingen reverse-sweeps and B
full_text: Adil Rashid to Michael van Lingen, 1 run, again tossed up outside the leg-stump, Michael van Lingen reverse-sweeps and Bairstow at backward point dives to his right to keep it to one

short_text: Adil Rashid to Michael van Lingen, , tossed up outside the leg-stump, Michael van Lingen comes down the track and lofts
full_text: Adil Rashid to Michael van Lingen, , tossed up outside the leg-stump, Michael van Lingen comes down the track and lofts massively over deep mid-wicket, all the way, Adil Rashid can't believe it
